ValidationRule.description: Region Forecast owners can edit Region Ask field only and not others.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(Type__c) <> "Region Ask-Orders" , TEXT(Type__c) <> "Region Ask-Shipment" , NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_4000_SIOP_Edit_All_Types ) , NOW() > fxFlowEditTime__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_SIOP_ENTRY_004: Forecast Owners can only edit Region Ask. Editing others records can be done my SIOP OTR and GCE users
